rulings.Case Title: JESSE BEVERLY JR VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant John Hine Pontiacs Joinder In Defendant Rohr, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action For Delay In Prosecution
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 29, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant John Hine Pontiac¿s joinder in defendant Rohr, Inc.¿s motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution is granted. No opposition filed. Hearing required unless counsel for defendant notifies Mr. Beverly of the tentative ruling and he states that he does not wish to contest. Hon. Ernest H. Goldsmith will be presiding over the hearing. = (220/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT G. EWING VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs¿ Motion For Order Substituting Successor In Interest For Deceased Plaintiff Continued From Dec. 28, 2010 On The Court¿S Own Motion To December 29, 2010 At 9:30 A.M. In Department 220.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 29, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Plaintiffs¿ motion for order substituting successor in interest for deceased plaintiff is granted. No opposition filed. If a hearing is requested, it will be conducted at 9:30am in Department 220, Hon. Ernest H. Goldsmith presiding. = (220/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT G. EWING VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs¿ Motion For Order Consolidating Cases Is Continued On The Court¿S Own Motion From December 28, 2010 To December 29, 2010 At 9:30 A.M. In Department 220.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 29, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Plaintiffs¿ motion for order consolidating cases is granted. No opposition filed. The actions with case numbers 275214 and 275601 are consolidated. Henceforth all papers in the consolidated cases will be filed in the lead case number 275214. If a hearing is requested, it will be conducted at 9:30am in Department 220, Hon. Ernest H. Goldsmith presiding. = (220/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: BEULAH MAE SIGSBEY et al VS. A.O. SMITH CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Carrier Corp.¿S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs¿ First Amended Complaint Continued On The Court¿S Own Motion From December 28, 2010 To December 29, 2010 At 9:30 A.M. In Department 220.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 29, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 5. Defendant Carrier Corp.¿s motion to strike portions of plaintiffs¿ first amended complaint is granted with 10 days leave to amend to give plaintiffs the opportunity, if they are able to do so, to allege facts sufficient to support a claim for punitive damages against defendant. If a hearing is requested, it will be conducted at 9:30am in Department 220, Hon. Ernest H. Goldsmith presiding. = (220/EHG)
